Actions.description: The available actions for this resource.
Actions.longDescription: This type shall contain the available actions for this resource.

^([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*)?@(odata|Redfis.description: This property shall specify a valid odata or Redfish property.

Oem.description: The available OEM-specific actions for this resource.
Oem.longDescription: This property shall contain the available OEM-specific actions for this resource.

Links.description: The links to other resources that are related to this resource.
Links.longDescription: This Redfish Specification-described type shall contain links to resources that are related to but are not contained by, or subordinate to, this resource.

^([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*)?@(odata|Redfis.description: This property shall specify a valid odata or Redfish property.

MemoryRegions.description: An array of links to the memory regions though which the memory extent capacity is exposed.
MemoryRegions.longDescription: This property shall contain an array of links to resources of type `MemoryRegion` that represent the dynamic capacity memory regions through which the memory extent capacity is exposed.

Oem.longDescription: This property shall contain the OEM extensions.  All values for properties contained in this object shall conform to the Redfish Specification-described requirements.

MemoryChunk.description: A memory chunk that provides capacity for a memory extent.
MemoryChunk.longDescription: This type shall contain a memory chunk that provides capacity for a memory extent.

^([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*)?@(odata|Redfis.description: This property shall specify a valid odata or Redfish property.

ChunkLink.description: The link to the memory chunk that provides capacity to the memory extent.
ChunkLink.longDescription: This property shall contain a link to a resource of type `MemoryChunks` that provides capacity to the memory extent.

ChunkOffsetMiB.description: The offset of the memory chunk within the memory extent in mebibytes (MiB).
ChunkOffsetMiB.longDescription: The value of this property shall contain the offset of the memory chunk within the memory extent in mebibytes (MiB).

MemoryExtent.description: The `MemoryExtent` schema contains definition of a CXL dynamic capacity memory extent and its configuration.
MemoryExtent.longDescription: This resource shall represent a CXL dynamic capacity memory extent in a Redfish implementation.

^([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*)?@(odata|Redfis.description: This property shall specify a valid odata or Redfish property.

Actions.description: The available actions for this resource.
Actions.longDescription: This property shall contain the available actions for this resource.

ExtentOffsetMiB.description: The offset of the memory extent in the device address range in mebibytes (MiB).
ExtentOffsetMiB.longDescription: The value of this property shall contain the offset of the memory extent in the device address range in mebibytes (MiB).

ExtentSizeMiB.description: The size of the memory extent in mebibytes (MiB).
ExtentSizeMiB.longDescription: This property shall contain the size of the memory extent in mebibytes (MiB).

FMReferencedExtent.description: An indication of whether this memory extent is referenced by the CXL Fabric Manager.
FMReferencedExtent.longDescription: This property shall indicate whether this memory extent is referenced by the CXL Fabric Manager.  If `true`, this memory extent cannot be sanitized, freed, or reallocated, regardless of whether it is currently assigned to any logical device.

Links.description: The links to other resources that are related to this resource.
Links.longDescription: This property shall contain links to resources that are related to but are not contained by, or subordinate to, this resource.

MemoryChunks.description: The set of memory chunks that provide capacity for this memory extent.
MemoryChunks.longDescription: This property shall contain the set of memory chunks that provide capacity for this memory extent.

Oem.longDescription: This property shall contain the OEM extensions.  All values for properties that this object contains shall conform to the Redfish Specification-described requirements.

SequenceNumber.longDescription: This property shall contain the sequence number instructing host on the relative order the extents have to be placed in the host adjacent virtual address space.

Status.description: The status and health of the resource and its subordinate or dependent resources.
Status.longDescription: This property shall contain any status or health properties of the resource.

Tag.description: The tag of this memory extent.
Tag.longDescription: This property shall contain an opaque context attached to each extent to track usage of each extent or map extent to specific processes, transactions, or workloads on the host.

OemActions.description: The available OEM-specific actions for this resource.
OemActions.longDescription: This type shall contain the available OEM-specific actions for this resource.

^([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*)?@(odata|Redfis.description: This property shall specify a valid odata or Redfish property.

title: #MemoryExtent.v1_0_0.MemoryExtent
